title: Added two recent papers not yet cited in the candidate
analysis_summary: Searched open literature for evidence supporting or contradicting the headline claim on this candidate. Surfaced two peer-reviewed papers published in the last year that the candidate record does not yet cite. One is a broadly supportive replication of the mechanism in a different cell line; the other reports a tissue-specific failure mode worth tracking but does not contradict the candidate's primary use case.
findings: Two new evidence items proposed: (a) supportive replication (doi:10.1038/s41586-2025-replication-demo), (b) tissue-specific caveat (doi:10.1101/2025-caveat-demo). Both peer-reviewed, neither preprint. Adding both to evidence_refs with the second flagged as boundary-case rather than contradictory.
limitations: Search was bounded to PubMed and bioRxiv between 2024 and submission date. Did not check non-English literature. The tissue-specific caveat may itself need replication before it is load-bearing.
